_meta.source: 2020 U.S. Religion Census (ASARB / usreligioncensus.org), County Summary
_meta.notes: adherence_pct = total congregational adherents (all 372 participating religious bodies, any tradition) as a percent of county population. This counts formal adherents on congregation rolls, NOT self-identified religious affiliation (Pew's state-level survey, used elsewhere in this app, reports self-identification and is not directly comparable — US national adherence here is ~49% vs Pew's ~72% self-identified Christian). Some rural/low-population counties exceed 100% because a single regional congregation can report adherents drawn from a wider service area than its home county (30 of 3,143 counties are affected, values kept as reported).
